title: Discs and Stuff
description: Add discs and other stuff from the Like a Dragon series and some other series.
body:
# MULTIFANDOM DISCS AND STUFF
This mods adds stuff from different series i like (or find stupid [looking at you SKIBIDI TOILET]), mainly discs, but there's also some items and blocks.


This mod includes 26 music discs, featuring songs from the Like a Dragon, Judge Eyes, Bleach, and Undertale (Yellow) series.
![26 music discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27750082133517ebd795723bc0dd130302e0cd98.png)
You can find these discs and some of the items in these structures:
![Structure featuring a chest and a painting of Kiryu Kazuma saying "ENJOY THE JAMS"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6592c91bd8c193fab506201182098ec5ab69298e.png)


<details>
<summary>Music discs as of v1.0.0:</summary>
So much more - Yakuza / Like a Butterfly - Yakuza  / Machine Gun Kiss - Yakuza  / The Future I Dreamed Of - Yakuza  / Awake - Yakuza  / Judgement (Kiryu version) - Yakuza  / 24 Hour Cinderella - Yakuza  / Baka Mitai (Kiryu version) - Yakuza  / Otometal My Life - Yakuza  / Outlaw's Lullaby (Y2) - Yakuza  / For Faith (Y3) - Yakuza  / Recieve and Bite You (Y4) - Yakuza  / Battle for the Dream (Y5) - Yakuza  / Recieve You ~Tech Trance~ (Y0) - Yakuza  / One Eyed Assassin (Y0) - Yakuza  / Friday Night (Y0) - Yakuza  / Blue Stompin' (LJ) - JudgeEyes  / Ferocious Red (LJ) - JudgeEyes  / Green Vibes (LJ) - JudgeEyes  / Long Drill on the Beach (LJ) - JudgeEyes  / Rasen (JE OP) - JudgeEyes  / Arpeggio (LJ OP) - JudgeEyes  / Number One (Original) - Bleach  / Number One Bankai - Bleach  / Megalovania - Undertale  / Apprehension - Undertale Yellow 
</details>

There's also some items from these series, some are craftable.

### LEGENDARY HERO'S BAT (7 Attack Damage, 2.5 Attack Speed, 576 Durability)
![Bat Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13efe9f8e749169f39a62ab0d8a6ed31da33778c.png)

### HYLIAN SHIELD (800 Durability)
![Shield recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66c0105cd52c8ac040729cc225f8310fbc6a83b1.png)

Then there's the miscellaneous items you can get from the structures:
-Vanish Cap: Get it from the Vanish Cap Block, on use it gives you invisibility for 60 seconds and plays the vanish cap song.
-Wii Phone: When used plays an awesome animation on your screen.
-Ayayay phone: On use plays the classic song from those toy phones, careful tho, it has limited uses.

## If you have suggestion for songs please leave it in the google forms form.

Made with Mcreator.
